ai_summary: AKI India Limited has undertaken a significant board and committee restructuring, appointing four new directors (three independent) and reconstituting its Audit, Nomination & Remuneration, and Stakeholder Relationship Committees. While the Audit and NRC are now entirely composed of newly appointed independent directors, enhancing governance oversight, a material impact and potential red flag is the appointment of Ms. Naba Fatima, a non-independent director, who is explicitly stated as the sister of both the Managing Director and another Non-Executive Director, raising concerns about potential conflicts of interest.
